'''jahoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dracontium|dracontium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dracontium|dracontium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jahoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæheyeth|jæheyeth]] || [[word:jæheyej|jæheyej]] || [[word:jæheyesh|jæheyesh]] || [[word:jæheye|jæheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jahohoyoth|jahohoyoth]] || [[word:jahohoyoj|jahohoyoj]] || [[word:jahohoyosh|jahohoyosh]] || [[word:jahohoyo|jahohoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jahoyoth|jahoyoth]] || [[word:jahoyoj|jahoyoj]] || [[word:jahoyosh|jahoyosh]] || [[word:jahoyo|jahoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jahofyoth|jahofyoth]] || [[word:jahofyoj|jahofyoj]] || [[word:jahofyosh|jahofyosh]] || [[word:jahofyof|jahofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jahoyotho|jahoyotho]] || [[word:jahoyojo|jahoyojo]] || [[word:jahoyosho|jahoyosho]] || [[word:jahoyoko|jahoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jahoyoth|jahoyoth]] || [[word:jahoyoj|jahoyoj]] || [[word:jahoyosh|jahoyosh]] || [[word:jahoyo|jahoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jahoyothol|jahoyothol]] || [[word:jahoyojol|jahoyojol]] || [[word:jahoyoshol|jahoyoshol]] || [[word:jahoyokol|jahoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jahoyothotho|jahoyothotho]] || [[word:jahoyojojo|jahoyojojo]] || [[word:jahoyoshosho|jahoyoshosho]] || [[word:jahoyoko|jahoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jahoyothon|jahoyothon]] || [[word:jahoyojon|jahoyojon]] || [[word:jahoyoshon|jahoyoshon]] || [[word:jahoyokon|jahoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jahoyothoro|jahoyothoro]] || [[word:jahoyojoro|jahoyojoro]] || [[word:jahoyoshoro|jahoyoshoro]] || [[word:jahoyokoro|jahoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
